entries.title: “Religions, which condemn the pleasures of sense, drive men to seek the pleasures of power. Throughout history power has been the vice of the ascetic.” — Bertrand Russell

entries.title: “Every person is a fool in somebody's opinion.” — Danish Proverb

entries.title: “In all of us, even in good men, there is a lawless wild-beast nature, which peers out in sleep” — Sokrates
